PROOF OF SERVICE OF MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT KILLILEA, RITA MCALISTER, MOIRA

DISCOVERY 302, NO APPEARANCES, TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED. DEFENDANTS RITA KILLILEA, AND MOIRA MCALISTER'S MOTION COMPELLING ASNWERS TO INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. DEFENDANTS' UNOPPOSED MOTION TO COMPEL IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE A VERIFIED RESPONSE TO DEFENDANTS' JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS RULING. DEFENDANTS' REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200, WHICH IS TO BE PAID BY PLAINTIFF TO DEFENDANT WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS RULING. (PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE PT: RICHARD GROTCH, NOT REPORTED.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDRES, KRISTINE SERVED OCT-30-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCALISTER, MOIRA
REMOVED FROM PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-31-2012 - CASE DID NOT SETTLE.

DISCOVERY 302, NO APPEARANCES, TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED. DEFENDANTS RITA KILLILEA AND MOIRA MCALISTER'S MOTION COMPELLING DOCUMENTS AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIOS. DEFENDANTS' UNOPPOSED MOTION TO COMPEL IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE A VERIFIED RESPONSE TO DEFENDANTS' REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION, SET ONE, WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, AND SHALL PRODUCE RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS TO DEFENDANT WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS RULING. DEFENDANTS' REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200, WHICH IS TO BE PAID BY PLAINTIFF TO DEFENDANT WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS RULING. (PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE PT: RICHARD GROTCH, NOT REPORTED.
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR FREEDMAN, MICHAEL ELLIS

Notice Of Motion And Motion Compelling Documents And Request For Monetary Sanctiosn
Off Calendar Feb-29-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted.
DEFENDANTS RITA KILLILEA AND MOIRA MCALISTER's Motion Compelling Documents And Request For Monetary Sanctios.
Defendants' unopposed motion to compel is granted. Plaintiff shall serve a verified response to defendants' request for production, set one, without objections, and shall produce responsive documents to defendant within 15 days of notice of this ruling. Defendants' request for monetary sanctions is granted in the amount of $200, which is to be paid by plaintiff to defendant within 15 days of notice of this ruling. (Prevailing party to submit a form of order.) Judge PT: Richard Grotch, not reported.

Notice Of Motion Adn Otion Compelling Asnwers To Interrogatories And Request For Monetary Sanctions; Pos; Memo Of P&A; Declaration
Off Calendar Feb-29-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted.
DEFENDANTS RITA KILLILEA AND MOIRA MCALISTER's Motion Compelling Asnwers To Interrogatories And Request For Monetary Sanctions.
Defendants' unopposed motion to compel is granted. Plaintiff shall serve a verified response to defendants' Judicial Council form interrogatories, set one, without objections, within 15 days of notice of this ruling. Defendants' request for monetary sanctions is granted in the amount of $200, which is to be paid by plaintiff to defendant within 15 days of notice of this ruling. (Prevailing party to submit a form of order.) Judge PT: Richard Grotch, not reported.
